segments.text: And it came to pass after many days, that the word of the LORD came to Elijah in the third year, saying,
Go, shew thyself unto Ahab; and I will send rain upon the earth.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And Elijah went to shew himself unto Ahab. And there was a sore famine in Samaria.
And Ahab called Obadiah, which was the governor of his house.

footnotes: the governor…: Heb. over his house

segments.text: For it was so, when Jezebel cut off the prophets of the LORD, that Obadiah took an hundred prophets, and hid them by fifty in a cave, and fed them with bread and water.
Go into the land, unto all fountains of water, and unto all brooks: peradventure we may find grass to save the horses and mules alive, that we lose not all the beasts.
segments.speaker: Ahab

footnotes: that…: Heb. that we cut not off ourselves from the beasts

segments.text: And as Obadiah was in the way, behold, Elijah met him:
Art thou that my lord Elijah?
segments.speaker: Obadiah

segments.text: I am: go, tell thy lord, Behold, Elijah is here.
segments.speaker: Elijah

segments.text: Art thou he that troubleth Israel?
segments.speaker: Ahab

segments.text: I have not troubled Israel; but thou, and thy father's house, in that ye have forsaken the commandments of the LORD, and thou hast followed Baalim.
segments.speaker: Elijah

segments.text: How long halt ye between two opinions? if the LORD be God, follow him: but if Baal, then follow him.
segments.speaker: Elijah

segments.text: And the people answered him not a word.
LORD God of Abraham, Isaac, and of Israel, let it be known this day that thou art God in Israel, and that I am thy servant, and that I have done all these things at thy word.
segments.speaker: Elijah

segments.text: Then the fire of the LORD fell, and consumed the burnt sacrifice, and the wood, and the stones, and the dust, and licked up the water that was in the trench.
Get thee up, eat and drink; for there is a sound of abundance of rain.
segments.speaker: Elijah

footnotes: a sound…: or, a sound of a noise of rain
heading: Rain Returns to Israel
